## 📝 Pull Request Summary

<!-- Briefly describe what this PR changes in the profile -->

### Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (broken badge, broken link, markdown error)
- [ ] 💄 Visual improvement (badge color, layout, spacing)
- [ ] ✨ New section / feature
- [ ] 🔧 GitHub Actions workflow improvement
- [ ] 📝 Text / copy update
- [ ] 🔒 Security fix
- [ ] 🧹 Cleanup / refactor

---

### Checklist

- [ ] I have tested the markdown renders correctly (GitHub preview or local renderer)
- [ ] All badge URLs are valid and return HTTP 200
- [ ] No personal information was changed without owner approval
- [ ] No secrets, emails, or credentials are added
- [ ] GitHub Actions YAML is valid (if modified)
- [ ] All external links open correctly
- [ ] Changes are consistent with the existing visual style

---

### Screenshots (if visual change)

<!-- Before / After screenshots are very helpful for UI changes -->

| Before | After |
|--------|-------|
| _screenshot_ | _screenshot_ |

---

### Related Issue

Closes # <!-- Link to issue if applicable -->
